perturbation.original_text: The parties therefore understand and acknowledge the critical need to maintain in absolute secrecy the Pin Codes generated for the Promotion such that they are only disclosed to the appropriate recipient via the authorized distribution method described herein. If the Pin Codes are made available to the public by Sponsor or by any of its employees, officers, directors, consultants, agents, representatives or advisors, except in the manner provided for herein, all parties agree that Pin Code security will be deemed compromised, and Charity Tunes may terminate all subsequent Pin Code redemptions.
perturbation.changed_text: The parties therefore understand and acknowledge the need to maintain the Pin Codes generated for the Promotion. If the Pin Codes are made available to the public by Sponsor, Pin Code security will be deemed compromised.
perturbation.explanation: The change removes the specific mention of 'absolute secrecy' and detailed list of parties responsible for maintaining that secrecy, also removes the phrase 'via the authorized distribution method described herein' which creates a contradiction in the responsibilities of parties if a breach happens as it is less clear now whose responsibility it is, also because this statement of 'Charity Tunes may terminate all subsequent Pin Code redemptions' creates an in-text contradiction when it is not clear who is the responsible party and it will affect the pin code redemptions, as it is less clear what appropriate measures will be taken
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Charity Tunes system used for redemption of downloads will ensure that (i) downloads are obtained under the Promotion only by way of redemption of eligible Pin Codes and only up to the maximum number of music downloads per Pin Code set out at paragraph 3 above, (ii) otherwise eligible Pin Codes are invalidated once they have been used to download their respective per Pin Code maximum, and (iii) the total maximum download limits described herein are observed.
perturbation.justification: The original text placed a critical need to maintain 'absolute secrecy' on the Pin Codes and mentioned who was responsible to keep them a secret. The changed text removed the 'absolute secrecy' clause and those responsible for maintaining it. This omission weakens the requirement and blurs the lines of responsibility. The contradicted text states that 'The Charity Tunes system used for redemption of downloads will ensure that (i) downloads are obtained under the Promotion only by way of redemption of eligible Pin Codes...', which is now jeopardized. Since it's less clear now whose responsibility it is to maintain the secrecy, it's uncertain if the Charity Tunes system can ensure the downloads are obtained only by eligible pin codes, creating a strong in-text contradiction.
